reasoning: The control SI-4 (10) focuses on the visibility of encrypted communications, which in a Kubernetes context can be mapped to ensuring that audit logs are enabled and encrypted, and that network policies and service mesh configurations allow for inspection of TLS traffic. Kubernetes audit logging can be configured to capture encrypted communication events, and ensuring TLS encryption for audit logs enhances security. Network policies and service mesh configurations can be used to inspect and manage encrypted communications within the cluster.
title: System Monitoring | Visibility of Encrypted Communications
